ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting (e.g., teleconference, WSU) */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of meeting (e.g., teleconference, in-person) */,
  "lunch_rotation" TEXT /* Institution responsible for lunch rotation */,
  "agenda_materials_due" TEXT /* Due date for agenda materials */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who organized the meeting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of people the location can accommodate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the location is available for booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lunch_rotations" (
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lunch rotation */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution responsible for lunch */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting associated with the rotation */,
  "rotation_date" TEXT /* Date of the lunch rotation */,
  "menu" TEXT /* Description of the lunch menu */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests expected for lunch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lunch_rotations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting associated with the request */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., new program, degree change) */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the request */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the request */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the request was reviewed */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requests_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requests_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agenda_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agenda material */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting associated with the material */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the material was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the agenda material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., document, presentation) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file (in bytes) */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the material */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agenda_materials_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agenda_materials_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
